title: ‘Don't drop it,’ said Prince William as Novak Djokovic handed the 2022 Wimbledon trophy to Prince George
summary_full: Prince George experienced a memorable moment at Wimbledon's centenary celebration, holding the champion's trophy for the first time. His father, Prince William, humorously warned him not to drop it, leading to a viral family scene. Princess Kate then gently took the trophy, concluding a touching display of royal tradition and childhood learning.
